title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: COLUMBIA GORGE HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are built with volunteer labor and donated materials and are then sold at no profit to homeowner families. Agency does not provide immediate or emergency housing. This is a long-term housing program. 111 E 5th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Households currently living in substandard housing and/or in need of safe and affordable housing who meet all of the following requirements: -Meet income guidelines -Can commit to 350 hours of sweat equity in construction -United States citizens or permanent residents -Have not owned a home in the past 3 years -Have the ability to make a mortgage payment (steady income and decent credit history) -Must credit qualify and pass background checks -Must already reside in the service area Hours: Tuesday/Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 296-8817 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-8817 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Cost of home when complete DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River, Klickitat, and Wasco Counties Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLUMBIA GORGE HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
